name: Independent: Token X/ Action
official_rules_text: At the start of the Activation Phase, if a unit with the Independent keyword does not have an Order token, that unit may gain X of the listed token(s) or make the listed action as a free action.
description: At the start of the Activation Phase, if a unit with the Independent keyword does not have an Order token, that unit may gain X of the listed token(s) or make the listed action as a free action.
